title: EBay Soars on Report That GameStop Is Preparing a Takeover Bid
description: EBay Inc. jumped more than 13% in after-hours trading on Friday after the Wall Street Journal reported that video-game retailer GameStop Corp. is preparing a bid for the company.

title: Apple Raises Mac Mini’s Starting Price to $799 After AI Frenzy Drains Supply
description: Apple Inc. raised the starting price of its Mac mini desktop to $799 from $599, adjusting to inventory shortages driven by AI demand and the tight supply of processors.

title: Fmr. BET CEO Debra Lee on Media Landscape, Handbag Line
description: Former BET Chair & CEO Debra Lee discusses the changing media landscape, why good content will always find its audience, and her new luxury handbag line. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
